name: core-network
title: Azure Core Network
summary: Creates a virtual network with standalone subnets (service endpoints, delegations), per-subnet route tables with UDRs, an optional NAT gateway, optional Network Watcher flow logs, and a CanNotDelete management lock on the VNet (on by default).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resource_group_name
module.description: Name of the existing resource group in which to create the VNet and child resources. Resource group lifecycle belongs to the consumer.

module.name: location
module.description: Azure region for all resources (e.g., 'eastus2'). No hardcoded regions — always supplied by the consumer.

module.name: address_space
module.description: IPv4 address space(s) for the virtual network (e.g., [\"10.40.0.0/16\"]).

module.name: dns_servers
module.description: Custom DNS server IPs for the VNet. Empty list uses Azure-provided DNS.

module.name: subnets
module.type: map(object({ address_prefixes = list(string) service_endpoints = optional(list(string), []) delegation = optional(object({ name = string actions = optional(list(string), ["Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/action"]) })) private_endpoint_network_policies_enabled = optional(bool, true) create_route_table = optional(bool, true) routes = optional(map(object({ address_prefix = string next_hop_type = string next_hop_in_ip_address = optional(string) })), {}) }))
module.description: Map of subnets keyed by logical name. Each subnet optionally gets its own route table (create_route_table, default true) with UDRs from routes. NSG association is intentionally NOT handled here — invoke the azure/firewall/nsgs module independently for that.

module.name: nat_gateway_subnet_keys
module.description: Logical subnet keys that should egress through a module-managed NAT gateway. Empty list disables NAT gateway creation.

module.name: nat_gateway_zones
module.description: Availability zones for the NAT gateway public IP (e.g., [\"1\"]). Azure NAT Gateway is zonal, not zone-redundant.

module.name: enable_flow_logs
module.description: Whether to enable VNet flow logs via Network Watcher. Requires network_watcher_name/network_watcher_resource_group and flow_log_storage_account_id.

module.name: network_watcher_name
module.description: Name of the existing Network Watcher instance (typically 'NetworkWatcher_<region>'). Required when enable_flow_logs = true.

module.name: network_watcher_resource_group
module.description: Resource group of the Network Watcher instance (typically 'NetworkWatcherRG'). Required when enable_flow_logs = true.

module.name: flow_log_storage_account_id
module.description: ID of the storage account receiving flow logs. Required when enable_flow_logs = true.

module.name: flow_log_retention_days
module.description: Retention in days for flow logs in the storage account.

module.name: enable_management_lock
module.description: Apply a CanNotDelete management lock to the VNet (governance/resource-locks). Remove the lock (apply with false) before destroying.

outputs.name: network_id
outputs.description: ID of the created virtual network.

outputs.name: network_name
outputs.description: Name of the created virtual network (needed by peering and DNS-link modules).

outputs.name: network_cidr
outputs.description: Address space of the virtual network (list — Azure VNets support multiple ranges).

outputs.name: subnet_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to subnet ID.

outputs.name: subnet_cidrs
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to address prefixes.

outputs.name: route_table_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to its route table ID (only subnets with create_route_table = true).

outputs.name: nat_ids
outputs.description: Map with key 'natgw' to the NAT gateway ID. Empty when no NAT subnets are configured.

outputs.name: nat_public_ips
outputs.description: Map with key 'natgw' to the NAT gateway public IP. Empty when NAT is disabled.

outputs.name: flow_log_id
outputs.description: ID of the Network Watcher flow log, or null when disabled.
